title: Add buildah info command

comments.body:
Fixes #1168 
Refer to the `podman info` command.
I agree @TomSweeneyRedHat, some data is better then none. But make sure you print the error.
updated and added a simple test.
One point of concern, otherwise LGTM.  TYVM for all the rework @q384566678 !
